apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-basic-service
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ts-basic-service
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ts-basic-service
    spec:
      dnsPolicy: "None"
      dnsConfig:
        nameservers:
          - 10.255.10.254
      containers:
      - name: ts-basic-service
        image: ghcr.io/sregym/ts-basic-service:latest
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        env:
        - name: SPRING_MAIN_ALLOW_CIRCULAR_REFERENCES
          value: 'true'
        - name: NODE_IP
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: status.hostIP
        envFrom:
        - configMapRef:
            name: nacos
        ports:
        - containerPort: 15680
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 350Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 15680
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  namespace: train-ticket
  name: ts-basic-service
spec:
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 15680
  selector:
    app: ts-basic-service
